source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.7|seg.1.1.1.8
distilled_thesis: The route explicitly names descent as going-under, giving the downward motion its first decisive human and verbal form.
